scripts.desktop:dev: cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 concurrently -k "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron desktop/windows/main.cjs"
scripts.desktop:dir: cross-env VITE_DESKTOP_BUILD=true vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.cjs --win dir
scripts.desktop:setup: cross-env VITE_DESKTOP_BUILD=true vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.cjs --win nsis
scripts.desktop:appx: cross-env VITE_DESKTOP_BUILD=true vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.cjs --win appx
scripts.winapp:manifest:generate: npx winapp manifest generate . --package-name MarcosNunes.SaldoFcil --publisher-name "CN=A72FE73A-3E4B-4A02-BA11-61A5278E9134" --version 1.0.0.0 --description "SaldoFacil - controle financeiro pessoal" --entrypoint ./release/win-unpacked/SaldoFacil.exe --if-exists Skip
scripts.winapp:manifest:sync: npm run winapp:manifest:generate && npm run winapp:manifest:assets && npm run winapp:manifest:alias
scripts.desktop:winapp:msix: npm run desktop:dir && npx winapp pack ./release/win-unpacked --manifest ./Package.appxmanifest --executable SaldoFacil.exe --output ./release/SaldoFacil-winapp.msix
scripts.desktop:winapp:msix:dev: npm run desktop:dir && npx winapp pack ./release/win-unpacked --manifest ./Package.appxmanifest --executable SaldoFacil.exe --output ./release/SaldoFacil-winapp-dev.msix --generate-cert --install-cert
